title: Tests + Gates Verification

test_suites.name: Organism infrastructure tests
test_suites.filter: -k 'organism or template or candidate or cadence or approval or sandbox or governance'

test_classes.TST-12: TestCampaignQueueRanking — sorting by template confidence, tiebreak by agent reliability
test_classes.TST-13: TestExtendedSources — 9 sources scanned, candidates have affected_files
test_classes.TST-14: TestBatchSelection — file conflict detection, excludes empty affected_files, batch max 5
test_classes.TST-15: TestApprovalPacketCreation — required fields, expiration, status transitions
test_classes.TST-16: TestDocumentationAlignmentTemplate — type exists, inference, governance pass

verdict: ALL PASS — 40 Phase 10.4 tests, 101 Phase 10.x tests, 258 organism tests, 6 gate checks
